creator: Richard@FrewinIT.uk
text:
Just a +1 here.  I am successfully running sssd 1.13.4 and samba410 in a small production environment.
sssd 1.13.4 based on modified patch above with files/patch-src__monitor.c fix and using ldb15.
samba410 was compiled with the following in make.conf:

.if ${.CURDIR:M*/net/samba410}
SAMBA4_BUNDLED_LDB=  no
.endif

Only using LDAP, but no known problems so far.
